---
title: "Euclidean distance between samples by normalisation method"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: united
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
---

# Prep


```{r, message=FALSE}
library(rtracklayer)
library(tidyverse)
library(DiffBind)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(UpSetR)
library(circlize)
library(ggplot2)
  
```


## Loading data
```{r}

load("/data/gpfs/projects/punim2745/03.CUTRUN_normalisation_KA/ER_dataset/3.realign_to_human_yeast/R_analysis/2.Diffbind/data/diffbind_analyse_workspace_2v2.RData")

```

## Useful function
```{r}
start_col  <- 6   # <-- move here

# Helper to extract peakset df from a dbObj
extract_peakset <- function(dbObj) {
  dbObj %>%
    dba.peakset(., bRetrieve = TRUE) %>%
    as.data.frame()
}
```


```{r}
no_norm <- extract_peakset(dbObj_RPKMnorm)

# Build the "No normalisation" peakset by unscaling library size factors
scale_factors   <- dbObj_RPKMnorm$norm$DESeq2$norm.facs
no_norm[, start_col:ncol(no_norm)] <- sweep(
  no_norm[, start_col:ncol(no_norm)], 2, scale_factors, `/`
)


```


```{r}
# List of peakset dataframes
peakset_list <- list(
  "No normalisation" = no_norm,
  "Background"       = extract_peakset(dbObj_RLEbackground),
  "Library size"     = extract_peakset(dbObj_RPKMnorm),
  "Greenlist"        = extract_peakset(dbObj_greenlist),
  "dm6 spike-in"     = extract_peakset(dbObj_dm6norm),
  "sacCer3 spike-in" = extract_peakset(dbObj_sacCer3norm),
  "Reads-in-peak"    = extract_peakset(dbObj_RLERiP)
)

norm_names <- names(peakset_list)
baseline   <- norm_names[1]
```



# Calculating replicate distances
```{r}
get_replicate_distances <- function(peaks_df, norm_name) {
  
  sample_cols <- peaks_df[, start_col:ncol(peaks_df)]
  sample_t    <- t(sample_cols)
  
  rownames(sample_t) <- rownames(sample_t) %>%
    gsub("^MCF7\\.", "", .) %>%
    gsub("\\.ER$",   "", .) %>%
    gsub("R1", "Rep1", .) %>%
    gsub("R2", "Rep2", .)
  
  euc_dist_matrix   <- as.matrix(dist(sample_t, method = "euclidean"))
  sample_names      <- rownames(euc_dist_matrix)
  conditions        <- gsub("\\.Rep[0-9]+$", "", sample_names)
  unique_conditions <- unique(conditions)
  
  map_dfr(unique_conditions, function(cond) {
    idx <- which(conditions == cond)
    if (length(idx) == 2) {
      data.frame(
        condition   = cond,
        sample1     = sample_names[idx[1]],
        sample2     = sample_names[idx[2]],
        distance    = euc_dist_matrix[idx[1], idx[2]],
        norm_method = norm_name
      )
    }
  })
}

```

```{r}

all_distances <- map2_dfr(peakset_list, norm_names, get_replicate_distances)

# --- missing chunk ---
baseline_distances <- all_distances %>%
  filter(norm_method == baseline) %>%
  select(condition, baseline_dist = distance)

all_distances <- all_distances %>%
  left_join(baseline_distances, by = "condition") %>%
  mutate(
    delta_distance = distance - baseline_dist,
    condition      = factor(condition),
    norm_method    = factor(norm_method, levels = norm_names)
  )
# ---------------------

```


# Plotting
```{r, fig.height=3,fig.width=8.5}
custom_colours <- c("#d31f11", "#f47a00", "#62c8d3", "#007191")


all_distances$condition <- all_distances$condition %>% gsub("CSS.","",.) %>% gsub("Complete.","",.)


rep_dist <- all_distances %>%
  #filter(norm_method != baseline) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x     = norm_method,
             y     = delta_distance,
             fill  = condition,
             shape = condition)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size     = 4,
             stroke   = 0.6,
             colour   = "black",
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.1, seed = 42)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = custom_colours) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 23, 24)) +
  labs(title = "Change in Replicate Euclidean Distance vs Baseline Normalisation",
       x     = "Normalisation Method",
       y     = paste0("\u0394 Euclidean Distance (vs ", baseline, ")"),
       fill  = "Condition",
       shape = "Condition") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
        legend.position = "right",
       # legend.title    = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"))

rep_dist

```



```{r}
pdf("./replicate_distance.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 3)
rep_dist
dev.off()

```
